Mob Control

Mob Control

Guide your cannon-spawned mob through a gauntlet of gates and obstacles to destroy the enemy base! Blue gates multiply your units, red gates divide them. Time your volleys, thread through moving multipliers, and unleash Champion abilities to break through fortified defenses. Each level rewards efficient routing, smart ability timing, and minimal losses with score ranks from C to S. Chain blue gates perfectly for bonus points and avoid red gates to maximize your final army size!

Controls: Left/Right Arrow: Aim cannon | A/D: Fine-tune aim | Space: Fire units (hold to stream) | Q: Champion ability | E: Swap Champion | Shift: Slow-motion aim | Z: Restart level | Enter: Start/Continue | Esc: Pause

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic cannon firing and unit spawning mechanics. Validates that units are created when Space is pressed and they move forward correctly. Checks collision detection with gates and base destruction mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Fire units continuously at the enemy base without worrying about optimal gate routing. Aim straight ahead and maintain constant fire to ensure units reach the base. Monitor unit count and base health to validate damage mechanics.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Units should spawn consistently, move toward the base, and deal damage on contact. The test succeeds when the enemy base is destroyed (GAME_OVER_WIN state) within a reasonable time frame, validating core mechanics work properly.
